---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the local UI, CLI, switching flow, or account-management workflow.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What friction or missing capability are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the behavior you want to add or change.

## Why It Matters

Who benefits and what gets easier, safer, or faster?

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, workflow examples, or alternative approaches if useful.
